title: Vitamin C - Canada.ca
content:
Learn about vitamin C and how to get enough.
- Getting enough vitamin C
Vitamin C is important for your health. It plays many roles in the body. For example, it:
- acts as an antioxidant
- helps the body absorb iron

## Getting enough vitamin C
Vegetables and fruits are the best sources of vitamin C. Canada's food guide recommends eating plenty of vegetables and fruits.
Vegetables that can help you get enough vitamin C include:
- leafy greens like: kale arugula kholrabi turnip greens mustard greens
Fruits that can help you get enough vitamin C include:
- citrus fruit such as: orange grapefruit

## For more information
- Eat vegetables and fruits
- Eat a variety of healthy foods
